none: 李淳風撰 觀象玩占 : 五〇卷 ; 附 太乙玉鑑風雨全傳 一卷,[China : s.n.], 明 [between 1465 and 1620],TNC 1742 4437  Harvard-Yenching Library
Guan xiang wan zhan, 50 juan ; fu Tai yi yu jian feng yu quan shu 1 juan
觀象玩占, 五〇卷 ; 附 太乙玉鑑風雨全傳 一卷
Yenching University collection, in rare books room.
Double leaves, oriental style, in case.
Seals: "Yao liu chuan wu sun wu", "Wu cheng", "Dun fu", "Dong yin qi chang", "Xian qing wang bao" [... et al.]
Seals: "要流傳勿損污", "吳城", "敦复", "董印其昌", "顯親王寶" [... et al.].

Electronic reproduction. Cambridge, Mass. : Harvard College Library Digital Imaging Group, 2008. (Fu Ssu-nien Library - Harvard Yenching Library Chinese rare book digitization project). Copy digitized: Harvard Yenching Library: TNC 1742 4437.
Microfilm. Cambridge, Mass. : Harvard College Library Imaging Services, 1986. 1 microfilm reel : negative ; 35 mm.
